story.iWant: to add, remove, reorder, and modify slides in my deck plan
story.soThat: the narrative matches my exact intent before building slides

tasks.task: Enhance Plan Modification Command Parser (AC: 1-4) - 1.1: Review existing parser from Story 5.1 (Task 4 in plan-deck instructions.md) - 1.2: Enhance add command parsing: extract position ("after slide N") and content topic - 1.3: Enhance remove command parsing: extract slide number, validate range - 1.4: Enhance move/reorder command parsing: extract source slide and target position - 1.5: Enhance modify command parsing: extract slide number and new focus/intent - 1.6: Add error handling for malformed commands with helpful suggestions

Implement Add Slide Logic (AC: 1, 5, 6, 7) - 2.1: Generate new slide entry with inferred template from content topic - 2.2: Set storyline_role based on position context (opening, tension, evidence, resolution, cta) - 2.3: Generate key_points based on topic and surrounding slides - 2.4: Insert slide at specified position - 2.5: Renumber all subsequent slides - 2.6: Save updated plan.yaml - 2.7: Display updated plan

Implement Remove Slide Logic (AC: 2, 5, 6, 7) - 3.1: Validate slide number exists in plan - 3.2: Remove slide entry from slides array - 3.3: Renumber all subsequent slides - 3.4: Update total_slides count - 3.5: Save updated plan.yaml - 3.6: Display updated plan showing removal

Implement Reorder/Move Slide Logic (AC: 3, 5, 6, 7, 8) - 4.1: Validate source and target positions - 4.2: Check if any affected slides have status "built" - 4.3: If built slides affected, display warning: "Note: Slide files not renamed. Built slides unchanged." - 4.4: Remove slide from source position - 4.5: Insert slide at target position - 4.6: Renumber all slides sequentially - 4.7: Save updated plan.yaml - 4.8: Display updated plan

Implement Modify Slide Description Logic (AC: 4, 5, 7) - 5.1: Validate slide number exists - 5.2: Update intent field with new focus - 5.3: Re-generate key_points based on new focus - 5.4: Re-evaluate suggested template based on new intent - 5.5: Update visual_guidance if needed - 5.6: Save updated plan.yaml - 5.7: Display updated slide details

Implement Plan Display After Modifications (AC: 5) - 6.1: Create consistent plan display format showing all slides - 6.2: Highlight the modified slide(s) in output - 6.3: Show slide number, intent, template, storyline_role for each - 6.4: Show total slide count

Update Workflow Instructions for Modification Loop (AC: 1-8) - 7.1: Enhance .slide-builder/workflows/plan-deck/instructions.md Step 4 - 7.2: Add detailed parsing logic for all command types - 7.3: Add built slide detection and warning logic - 7.4: Ensure modification loop continues until "done" - 7.5: Verify plan.yaml persistence after each modification

Testing - All Modification Operations (AC: 1-8) - 8.1: Test add slide at various positions (beginning, middle, end) - 8.2: Test remove slide at various positions - 8.3: Test move slide forward (e.g., 7 to 2) and backward (e.g., 2 to 7) - 8.4: Test modify slide description - 8.5: Test built slide warning (build a slide, then try to affect it) - 8.6: Verify plan.yaml correct after compound modifications - 8.7: Run Frontend Test Gate checklist

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given a deck plan has been proposed, when the user requests to add a slide (e.g., "Add a slide about ROI after slide 3"), then a new slide is inserted at the specified position
When the user requests to remove a slide (e.g., "Remove slide 5"), then the slide is deleted and remaining slides are renumbered
When the user requests to reorder slides (e.g., "Move slide 7 to position 2"), then slides are reordered accordingly
When the user requests to modify a slide description (e.g., "Change slide 3 to focus on security"), then the slide intent/description is updated
After each modification, the updated plan is displayed to the user
Slide numbers are automatically renumbered after structural changes
The plan.yaml file is saved after each modification
If built slides exist and would be affected by reorder, a warning is displayed

docs.doc: Epic 5 tech spec - defines Plan Modifier module, modification command patterns, renumbering flow, and edge cases
Architecture document - Novel Pattern 2 (Template-or-Custom Decision), Novel Pattern 4 (Dual-Mode State Management), State File Patterns
Epic definitions - Story 5.2 user story and acceptance criteria context
Previous story - establishes plan.yaml schema, modification loop basics in Step 4, template mapping patterns

artifact.description: Main workflow instructions implementing plan-deck. Step 4 contains the modification loop to be enhanced.
artifact.keySection: Current implementation includes basic add/remove/move/change parsing but needs: - Robust error handling for malformed commands - Built slide detection and warning - Immediate persistence after each change - Rich context regeneration for added/modified slides

keySection.name: Step 5 - Save plan and update status

artifact.keySection: Contains plan.yaml schema with full slide structure: number, intent, template, status, storyline_role, key_points, visual_guidance, tone

artifact.description: Workflow configuration with template_mapping patterns for intent-to-template matching
artifact.keySection: title: ["title", "intro", "opening", "welcome"] list: ["list", "bullets", "points", "agenda"] flow: ["flow", "process", "timeline", "steps", "journey"] columns-2: ["compare", "vs", "versus", "two", "split"] columns-3: ["three", "triad", "options", "trio"] callout: ["key", "insight", "callout", "cta", "highlight", "quote"] code: ["code", "technical", "api", "demo"]

artifact.description: Example deck plan with 9 slides - reference for plan.yaml structure
artifact.keySection: Each slide has: number, intent, template, status (pending/built), storyline_role, key_points array, visual_guidance, tone

artifact.description: Current status tracking file - shows mode: deck, total_slides, built_count

dependencies.dependency: Use template_mapping from workflow.yaml for new/modified slides
Determine storyline_role based on position context

constraints.constraint: Slide numbers MUST be automatically renumbered after structural changes
plan.yaml MUST be saved after each modification (not just at the end)
Built slides warning MUST be displayed when reordering affects built slides
Slide files named slide-{n}.html remain stable after build (renumbering in plan doesn't rename files)
Never delete history entries in status.yaml
All modification logic lives in instructions.md (not separate code files)

interface.name: Plan Modification Commands
interface.description: Natural language commands parsed in Step 4 of plan-deck workflow

commands.command: "Add a slide about X after slide N" - Insert new slide at position N+1
"Remove slide N" - Delete slide, renumber remaining
"Move slide N to position M" - Reorder slides
"Change slide N to focus on Y" - Update slide intent/description

interface.name: Template Mapping Pattern
interface.description: Intent keywords to template matching (Architecture Novel Pattern 2)

standards.standard: Test each modification type (add, remove, move, change) independently
Verify plan.yaml file updated on disk after each modification
Verify slide numbers sequential (1, 2, 3...) after structural changes
Test with built slides present to verify warning display
Run Frontend Test Gate checklist as final validation

locations.location: Frontend Test Gate 5-2-TG1 in story file - manual browser testing steps
Task 8 subtasks in story file - comprehensive test scenarios

ideas.idea: Test add slide at beginning (after slide 0 or position 1)
Test add slide at end (after last slide)
Test add slide in middle (after slide 3 in 9-slide deck)
Test remove first slide, middle slide, last slide
Test move forward (slide 7 to position 2) and backward (slide 2 to position 7)
Test move to same position (should report "no change needed")
Test remove only slide (should warn "cannot remove only slide")
Test modify slide with significant intent change (should re-match template)
Test compound modifications: add, then remove, then move in sequence
Test built slide warning: build slide 1, then move slide 3 to position 1
Edge case: slide number out of range
